// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService, global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyTaggedService, global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService>();

            return services;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Tag1'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly_Tag1(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService, global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyTaggedService, global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService>();

            return services;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Tag2'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly_Tag2(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService, global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyTaggedService, global::TestNamespace.MyTaggedService>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
